name: Pouf Ottoman - Cloud Island™ Navy
description: Add some functional style to your child's room or nursery with the Navy Pouf Ottoman from cloud island™. In a pouf-like style with a solid navy hue, this navy pouf ottoman has a knitted design that creates stylish texture and a soft exterior. The soft cotton fabric and rounded shape is great for little ones learning to crawl and toddle around with it's lack of hard surfaces or sharp edges, while the compact and lightweight design lets you easily move it around a nursery or child's playroom when they need more space.
